reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación con todos los servicios. Emplazada sobre la ruta para dirigirse a Villa Pehuenia. Imprescindible abastecerse. Te dejan acampar y/o aparcar en el predio aunque no seas socio. Ideal.

(Translated by Google)
A very good station with all the services. Located on the route to Villa Pehuenia. It's essential to stock up. They let you camp and/or park on the property even if you're not a member. Ideal.

reviews.comment:
Excelente!! Primero que nada la atencion es un espectaculo!! Cenamos hoy con mi mamá que va siempre. La comida deliciosa,  el ambiente muy agradable, muy limpio. Ideal!! Muy buena relacion precio calidad! Entre $600 / $800 x persona mas o menos comiendo muy muy bien! Amplia carta!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent!! First of all, the service is spectacular!! We had dinner tonight with my mom, who's a regular. The food was delicious, the atmosphere very pleasant, and very clean. Ideal!! Very good value for money! Between $600 and $800 per person, more or less, and a very, very good meal! Extensive menu!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwdWF6MFJ3EAE
